## Summary

Describe the user-visible problem and the chosen solution.

## Validation

- [ ] Added or updated Python tests
- [ ] Ran the relevant pytest suite
- [ ] Ran Ruff and mypy
- [ ] Ran rustfmt and Clippy when Rust changed
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` for user-visible changes
- [ ] Updated canonical English documentation when behavior or API changed

List the exact commands and results:

```text

```

## PDF corpus

- [ ] No new PDF fixture
- [ ] New fixtures are minimal, redistributable, and documented with source and license
- [ ] Private and unrelated metadata has been removed

## Performance

If performance changed, include the corpus, task definition, environment,
medians, and both wins and losses.
